description: Intent-only request: classify sentiment-based review routing as workflow-anchored with a bounded LLM step.

conversation.text: Analyze review sentiment; send negative ones to support, auto-thank the positive ones.

processExpectations: The agent explains that sentiment analysis is a bounded classification step feeding a fixed two-way branch, not an open-ended decision loop.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
